scores.correctness_notes: Fully covers gold standard content: containers/resources linkage, type field, description field, key rule about name matching. Goes beyond gold standard with multi-container example and charmhub upload instructions.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'charmcraft upload-resource' command with '--image' flag and the 'mounts' section in containers are not covered in the gold standard. These may be valid but cannot be verified against the provided gold standard. Minor risk of hallucination on the upload command syntax.
